visual_summary: A styled button component with rounded edges and hover effects
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics: Name: cosmic-button-demo Description: A styled button component with rounded edges and hover effects Style: rounded Interactions: hover Tags: button Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Cosmic button goes brrr
) }
